subject: docs(specs): add advertising & search platform specifications
body:
Added Google Ads (14 display sizes, RDAs, Shopping, YouTube ads,
Performance Max), Meta Ads (consolidated cross-platform ratios),
and TikTok Ads (safe zones and restrictions) specifications.

Tags: docs, specs, platforms, advertising, google-ads, meta-ads

Impact: internal
Risk: low
